creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
sobomax@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: new port: x11/cmatrix
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: sobomax
> State-Changed-When: Mon Jun 5 07:56:48 PDT 2000
> State-Changed-Why:
> Sorry, but the cmatrix port is already in the tree (see misc/cmatrix).
>
> Anyway thanks for your efforts, please keep doing!

However, if you want, I can assing maintainership of cmatrix to you because
currently it has no particular maintainer (MAINTAINER = ports@FreeBSD.org).
Please let me know if you agree.

-Maxim
